title: gleichenia truncata
intro: Gleichenia truncata, also known as the truncated spleenwort or truncated fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. It is native to Australia, New Zealand, and parts of the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin conditions and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to promote wound healing and reduce fever.
